lines: No results in the last 48 hours, so everyone can sit in their own festering anxiety a bit longer — lovely stuff.

TODAY'S BIG ONE: France vs Morocco in the quarter-final, and half the fucking sweepstake has a horse in this race — Callum (2nd, 75pts) is the greedy cunt who drew BOTH teams, meaning he wins either way while the rest of you seethe.

Butters leads the table on 80pts with Morocco still alive, but Portugal are already in the bin, so if Morocco get turned over by France today, his lead starts looking very fucking fragile very fucking fast.

Special mention to Wilmot — sitting joint 2nd on 75pts with England and Morocco and Norway still in, which sounds great until you remember Saudi Arabia got hoofed out in the groups and Wilmot has been coasting on luck like a fat man on a mobility scooter, contributing absolutely nothing of his own, just praying other people's draws carry him to glory like the parasitic little weasel he is.

Watch today's France vs Morocco closely — if France win, Croft, Dene, and The Foreman all get a boost while Butters and Wilmot take a hit at the top; if Morocco win, Butters and Jim (who's 5th on 59pts and desperately needs it) live another day — this one matters, don't fucking blink.
